summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 1.57%.the main contract I2401 closed 719.5. some traders were negative to sell, steel mills purchasedon demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
